value.found_quote: **Save a version.** Codex builds the deployable site and associates that version with the source Git commit used for the build. Use this stage when you want a reviewable deployment candidate.
value.rationale: The page describes "Save a version" as one of the two stages of Sites publishing, where Codex builds a reviewable deployment candidate. Sites itself is described as "in preview," so the feature is part of a preview offering.
